economic_notes: First Nation holds 17.9% interest in Nlaka'pamux Resources Limited Partnership, a commercial economic development partnership. Distributions received of $87,943 in 2021. Partnership had total assets of $7,901,592 and net income of $309,840 at December 31, 2021.
notes: Audit is qualified because budget information was not formally approved by Chief and Council. Auditor firm name not clearly stated - identified only as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' based in Chilliwack, BC, report dated May 8, 2024 for a March 31, 2021 fiscal year (unusually long delay of 3 years). Long-term debt includes both the All Nation's Trust mortgage ($1,053,214) and RBC term loans due on demand ($284,395) totalling $1,337,609. Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long-term debt ($17,875) plus repayment of term loans due on demand ($855,365) = $873,240. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,551,214) + Province of BC ($70,018) + First Nation Health Authority ($65,364) + CMHC ($48,594) + Fraser Thompson Indian Services Society ($165,435) + FNESC ($28,280) = $1,928,905; Sto:lo Aboriginal Skills & Training ($3,248) may also be government transfer bringing total to $1,932,153. OSR adjusted accordingly. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. Investments segment revenue of $79,705 represents earnings from Nlaka'pamux Resources LP.
